_comment_mode: Trading mode: 'simulation' (mock data), 'paper' (real data, simulated trades), 'live' (real trading). For backtesting, use 'quanta trade backtest' command

exchange.name: simulator
exchange._comment_apiKey: API key for authentication (optional for public data in simulation mode)
exchange._comment_apiSecret: API secret for authentication (optional for public data in simulation mode)

ai._comment_apiKey: OpenRouter API key for AI signal generation
ai._comment_model: AI model to use for trading signals
ai._comment_temperature: AI creativity level (0.0-2.0, lower = more conservative)

trading._comment_coins: List of cryptocurrency pairs to trade (without /USDT suffix)
trading._comment_cyclePeriod: Time between trading cycles in milliseconds (180000 = 3 minutes)
trading._comment_maxPositions: Maximum number of simultaneous open positions
trading._comment_leverageRange: Leverage range [min, max] - e.g., [5, 40] means 5x to 40x leverage
trading._comment_maxRisk: Maximum risk per trade as fraction of account (0.05 = 5%)

notifications._comment_enabled: Enable webhook notifications for trading events

logging._comment_maxFileSize: Maximum log file size in bytes (default: 10MB)
logging._comment_maxFiles: Number of days to keep logs (default: 14)
